actions.name: Set enabled
actions.description: Enable or disable the behavior. If disabled, the object will not cast a shadow.

actions.name: Set height
actions.description: Set the height property of the behavior. For more information see Shadow caster properties.

actions.name: Set tag
actions.description: Change the tag of the behavior. For more information see Shadow caster properties.

conditions.name: Compare height
conditions.description: Compare the current height property of the behavior to a value.

conditions.name: Is enabled
conditions.description: True if the behavior is currently enabled so it can cast shadows.

expressions.name: Tag
expressions.description: Return the currently set tag for the behavior.
